item.name: Markab Whistle
item.description: This tiny whistle emits a shrill tone which can only be heard by Markab, blessed steed of the Lord of Levin.

mount.name: Markab
mount.action: Summon forth Markab, the legendary steed favored of the primal Ramuh. It is said to have been born of a single thunderbolt.
mount.description: Legend states that the Lord of Levin, Ramuh, drew forth this magicked steed from a nightmare offered by the sylphs in sacrifice.
mount.tooltip:
Nay is but a hoofbeat
away from neigh!
- Uma Bugyo
